blockingIssues.description: Expected behavior 'Hover then reroll flow works without visual glitches' was not verified. The handoff shows no hover interaction testing. Worker should have hovered over album cover (verifying scale effect), then moved to reroll button and clicked to verify clean transition.

Expected behavior 'Catalog refresh shows running state, then returns to ready' was not verified. Code shows this flow exists (status polling, amber dot for running, emerald for ready, spinning refresh icon), but worker did not trigger refresh or verify status indicators.

Expected behavior 'Errors display toast notification, previous album remains' was not verified. Worker did not test error scenarios (network failure, empty bucket). Code has error handling via toast.error(), but verification needed.

appliedUpdates.description: Updated animation timings in architecture.md to reflect actual values (album-enter: 320ms, cover-sheen: 1.2s, shimmer: 1.2s). Added AbortController/request cancellation pattern documentation.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add guidance for verification-only features: When a feature's expected behavior includes verification of existing flows (not just implementation), workers must test all flows explicitly, not just visual inspection. Verification features should enumerate specific test cases (hover interactions, status changes, error scenarios).
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: cross-flow-interactions worker tested 5/8 flows but missed hover-then-reroll, catalog refresh status, and error handling toast. The frontend-polish-worker skill focuses on implementation and visual verification, not comprehensive flow testing.
